meaning: adv.(在光谱上)朝红色,向着红色
examples: However, Peter Redward, of Barclays Capital, argues that Asia can recover earlier and more strongly than elsewhere.
Peter Redward, an economist at Barclays Capital, expects average GDP growth in emerging Asia of almost 5% in 2009 as a whole.
'Growth globally is dominated by emerging Asia, China especially and increasingly India,' said Peter Redward, head of Asia emerging-market research at Barclays Capital in Singapore.
If the shift is redward, the star is receding.
